name: Industrial Production (IIP)
description: The Index of Industrial Production tracks output across mining, manufacturing and electricity. It's the earliest, most timely read on how the factory economy is actually performing, released well before quarterly GDP.
source: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation (MoSPI)
releaseSchedule: Released monthly, around six weeks after month-end.

chart.title: Factory output picked up through the year
chart.subtitle: IIP growth, year-on-year %, monthly
